title: Customers Above Average Order Amount
description: Find customers who have placed at least one order with an amount greater than the average order amount across all orders. Return distinct customer ids.
sql_solution: SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM orders WHERE amount > (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM orders);
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

average_order_amount = orders.agg(avg("amount").alias("avg_amount"))

result = (
    orders.crossJoin(average_order_amount)
    .filter(col("amount") > col("avg_amount"))
    .select("customer_id")
    .distinct()
)
